title: Political Science and International Relations (English) Message from the Department Head
content:
Political Science and International Relations (English) Message from the Department Head

Dear Students,

Welcome to the Department of Political Science and International Relations (English). From the moment you join us, we truly value your involvement in shaping and improving our Department with your thoughts and suggestions.

Please take a look at our Department Activity Plan, which we have designed in line with the University’s Academic Calendar and Faculty activities. This plan will continue to evolve based on your ideas and requests, and updates will be shared through our website. You can also find links explaining your rights and responsibilities regarding key areas you’ll encounter during your studies—such as Academic Advising, Assessment and Evaluation, Double Major/Minor Programs and Exemptions, Erasmus Student Mobility, Internships, Career Counseling, the Üsküdar University Strategic Research Center (ÜSSAM) Internship Program, and Graduation.

Throughout your academic journey, feel free to share your suggestions with your Academic Advisors or directly with me, either through the STIX platform or in person. A class representative elected from each year will serve on the Department Advisory Board to voice your opinions. You can also share your feedback through your representatives or bring up your ideas during the meetings scheduled in our Department Activity Plan.

Wishing you a lifetime of health and success.

Warm regards,

Head of Department
